1	import { EXERCISE_CATALOG } from '../../../data/exerciseCatalog';
2	import type { ResolvedExercise, WorkoutExercise } from '../types';
3	
4	// Merge a workout's exercise prescription with the catalog metadata. When the
5	// catalog has no matching entry (legacy import that couldn't be mapped), fall
6	// back to the inlined exercise_name and flag the result as unmapped so the UI
7	// can show an indicator and skip demo/technique chrome.
8	export function resolveExercise(entry: WorkoutExercise): ResolvedExercise {
9	  const cat = EXERCISE_CATALOG[entry.exercise_id];
10	  if (cat) {
11	    return {
12	      id: cat.id,
13	      name: cat.name,
14	      unmapped: false,
15	      sets: entry.sets,
16	      reps: entry.reps,
17	      rest: entry.rest,
18	      demoVideoId: cat.demoVideoId,
19	      demoVideoStart: cat.demoVideoStart,
20	      techniqueNote: cat.techniqueNote,
21	      usesWeight: cat.usesWeight,
22	      startingWeight: entry.starting_weight ?? cat.defaultStartingWeight,
23	      weightIncrement: entry.weight_increment ?? cat.defaultWeightIncrement,
24	    };
25	  }
26	  return {
27	    id: entry.exercise_id,
28	    name: entry.exercise_name ?? entry.exercise_id,
29	    unmapped: true,
30	    sets: entry.sets,
31	    reps: entry.reps,
32	    rest: entry.rest,
33	    usesWeight: entry.starting_weight != null,
34	    startingWeight: entry.starting_weight,
35	    weightIncrement: entry.weight_increment,
36	  };
37	}

name: Test

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  nix-lint:
    name: Nix Lint
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Check formatting
        run: nix run nixpkgs#nixfmt -- --check .

  zizmor:
    name: Zizmor
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - uses: cachix/install-nix-action@08dcb3a5e62fa31e2da3d490afc4176ef55ecd72 # v30
        with:
          nix_path: nixpkgs=channel:nixos-unstable

      - name: Run zizmor
        run: |
          rc=0
          nix run nixpkgs#zizmor -- . --no-online-audits || rc=$?
          # Exit 13 = warnings only (acceptable), exit 14+ = errors
          if [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && [ "$rc" -ne 13 ]; then exit "$rc"; fi

  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Build production bundle
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run build"

  program-principles:
    name: Program Principles
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Validate program data and principles
        run: nix develop --command bash -c "npm ci && npm run validate-program"

  e2e:
    name: E2E Tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Install Nix
        uses: DeterminateSystems/nix-installer-action@430608d219b9321ec0c98eb6c37245a39aa6756e # main

      - name: Setup Nix cache
        uses: DeterminateSystems/magic-nix-cache-action@1828eb4e5414b8dfe36daae53ea3e4b8c3fdec7a # main

      - name: Run Playwright tests
        run: nix develop .#test --command npx playwright test --project=chromium

      - name: Upload test artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@ea165f8d65b6e75b540449e92b4886f43607fa02 # v4
        if: failure()
        with:
          name: playwright-report
          path: |
            playwright-report/
            test-results/
          retention-days: 7
